name: semantic-core
description: Deterministic contextual memory middleware — Sprint 0 foundations

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @memory-middleware/shared-types && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/observability && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/normalization && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/structural && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/scoring && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/ingestion && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/relationship && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/domain-engine && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/observation-registry && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/observation-ingestion && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/observation-providers && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/retrieval && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/planning && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/compression && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/context-delivery && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/historian && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/retrieval-diagnostics
scripts.build:api: npm run build:packages && npm run db:generate -w @memory-middleware/api && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/api
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build -w @memory-middleware/dashboard
scripts.setup:db: npm run docker:up && npm run db:migrate:deploy
scripts.perf:test-explain-slow-query: npm run build -w @memory-middleware/observability && npx tsx --test scripts/explain-slow-query.test.ts
